Custom Shaped Yard Signs for Maximum Visibility & Impact

** All signs greater than 32" x 48" in any direction are automatically scored and folded. To score your coroplast signs, we cut through the top layer of the yard sign without cutting through the entire piece. The sign is then folded into an optimal fit to meet shipping guidelines.**

** If you don't want your yard signs to be scored and folded please visit our oversized flat shipping page or contact one of our customer service representatives at: 320-391-5300. **

** Please note: When ordering yard signs with different designs, text, imagery, etc., these signs will be priced and processed as 1 sign per design. **

Shaped yard signs serve as a flexible marketing solution often placed in residential yards for business promotions, political campaigns, property showings, and garage sales. These signs are ideal for various occasions due to their lightweight design, simple setup, and cost-effectiveness compared to other types of signage. Additionally, they are highly efficient at conveying brief messages to drivers and pedestrians nearby.

We offer free online templates, an intuitive online designer and real-time tracking for your order. You can also add wire installation stakes to your order to accommodate your single or double-sided yard sign. Begin your order for professionally designed and manufactured yard signs today.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Material Options for Custom Shaped Yard Sign Durability

These signs are digitally printed in full color on a 4 mm white corrugated plastic material. This material has hollow flutes in it similar to cardboard, which run horizontally on a 4' x 8' sheet (the 96 in direction.) The 4 mm corrugated plastic material is durable, lightweight, waterproof, and can be printed single sided or double sided, making this product a great option for outdoor advertising.

*Please note, all coroplast yard signs will be cut 1/8th of an inch on each side to allow for finishing. (ex. a 18" x 24" yard sign will actually ship out to you as a 17.75" x 23.75" yard sign.) If your yard sign needs to be precise, please reach out to one of our customer service reps to discuss your specific application.*

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finishing Options for Shaped Yard Sign Installation

The following finishing options are available:

  • 1/2" in white margin or a full bleed (the ink goes all the way to the edge of the sign)
  • Single or double sided signs
  • Yard sign accessories: H Stake 10x15, 10x24 or 10x30. Beefy Stakes. Zip Ties 12 inches - Black and Zip Ties 36 inches - White.

Scoring

All signs over 32" x 48" or any sign where the H + W is 81 inches or greater are automatically scored and folded. To score your coroplast signs, we cut through the top layer of the yard sign without cutting through the entire piece. The sign is then folded into an optimal fit to meet shipping guidelines.

If you don't want your yard signs to be scored and folded please visit our oversized flat shipping page or contact one of our customer service representatives at: 320-391-5300.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Payment Options for Shaped Yard Sign Orders

We accept all major credit cards and provide secure online payment processing for your shaped yard sign orders. Payment is processed when your order is approved and sent into production.

For large volume orders or corporate accounts, alternative payment arrangements may be available. Please contact our customer service team at 320-391-5300 to discuss payment options for bulk shaped yard sign orders.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Guidelines for Custom Shaped Yard Sign Delivery

All shaped yard signs are carefully packaged to ensure safe delivery to your location. Standard shipping options include ground delivery with tracking information provided once your order ships.

For expedited delivery needs, express shipping options are available during checkout. Large or oversized shaped yard signs may require special handling and additional shipping time.

Please note that production time and shipping time are calculated separately. Your total delivery time includes both the selected production timeframe plus shipping transit time to your location.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Business & Marketing Uses for Custom Shaped Yard Signs

Custom shaped yard signs are versatile marketing tools perfect for:

  • Business Promotions: Eye-catching shapes that draw attention to sales, grand openings, and special events
  • Political Campaigns: Distinctive shapes that help candidates stand out from traditional rectangular signs
  • Real Estate: Custom house or arrow shapes for property listings and open house announcements
  • Construction Sites: Warning shapes and directional signs for safety and navigation
  • Special Events: Birthday parties, graduations, and celebrations with fun, themed shapes
  • Garage Sales: Arrow shapes and attention-grabbing designs to direct traffic
  • Non-Profit Organizations: Custom shapes that reflect your cause or mission

The lightweight corrugated plastic material makes these signs easy to install with ground stakes while remaining durable enough for extended outdoor use in various weather conditions.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shaped Yard Sign Artwork Requirements for Professional Printing

Artwork Guidelines

The file that prints best is .eps converted to outline. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you.

Artwork/Order Proofs

If you would like to double-check your order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork, a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information. Please note that if you request a proof, we will not send your order into production until you have sent your approval.

Color Match Proof System

If your project is color critical, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific project. For more details, please contact a customer service representative.

Frequently Asked Questions

What material are die-cut yard signs made from?

Die-cut yard signs are made from 4mm white corrugated plastic (coroplast) material. This durable, lightweight, and waterproof material is perfect for outdoor use and can withstand various weather conditions while maintaining its shape and print quality.

Are die-cut yard signs waterproof and weather-resistant?

Yes, custom shaped yard signs are fully waterproof and weather-resistant. The corrugated plastic material and UV-resistant inks ensure your signs maintain their appearance and durability through rain, sun, and other outdoor conditions.

What ground stake options are available?

We offer several ground stake accessories including H Stakes in sizes 10x15, 10x24, and 10x30, as well as Beefy Stakes for enhanced stability. We also provide zip ties in 12-inch black and 36-inch white options for secure installation.

Can you help with my die-cut yard sign design?

Absolutely! Our professional graphic design team can help create your custom shaped yard sign design. We accept various file formats and offer design services to ensure your sign looks professional and achieves maximum impact.

What are shaped (die-cut) yard signs commonly used for?

Custom shaped yard signs are popular for business promotions, political campaigns, real estate listings, construction sites, special events like birthdays and graduations, garage sales, and non-profit organization campaigns. The unique shapes help these signs stand out from traditional rectangular signage.

Do you offer custom sizes for die-cut yard signs?

Yes, we can create custom shaped yard signs in virtually any size you need. Please note that signs larger than 32" x 48" are automatically scored and folded for shipping. Contact our customer service team to discuss specific size requirements for your project.

Can I request a proof before printing?

Yes, we offer order proofs that include a low-resolution image of your artwork, order summary with pricing, and billing/shipping information. Please note that requesting a proof will pause production until you provide approval.

What production times do you offer, and when does turnaround start?

We offer production times ranging from 1 to 5 business days: 1-day Priority, 2-day Express, 3-day Standard, and 5-day Saver options. Turnaround time starts from when your file upload is complete, or from approval time if a proof is requested.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------

Magnetic Sign Material for Vehicle & Business Applications

Our custom magnetic signs are perfect for temporary vehicle advertising, business promotions, and indoor displays on any magnetic-receptive surface. Each magnetic sign is printed on durable 30 mil magnetic material with lamination included for long-lasting outdoor use.

Premium Magnetic Sign Features:

  • 30 mil magnetic material for strong adhesion
  • Protective lamination included for weather resistance
  • Full-color printing capabilities
  • Maximum print size of 24" x 24"
  • Compatible with steel vehicle panels and magnetic surfaces
  • Easy application and removal without residue

Important: Before purchasing, ensure your intended surface is magnetic receptive. Magnetic signs will not adhere to aluminum or plastic vehicle body panels.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Magnetic Sign Material for Vehicle & Business Applications

Our magnetic signs are manufactured using premium 30 mil magnetic material, providing the perfect balance of flexibility and holding power for vehicle and business applications.

Material Specifications:

  • Thickness: 30 mil magnetic material
  • Finish: Protective lamination included
  • Printing: Full-color digital printing
  • Maximum Size: 24" x 24"
  • Compatibility: Steel surfaces, refrigerators, filing cabinets
  • Weather Resistance: Suitable for outdoor vehicle use

Surface Compatibility: Magnetic signs work best on steel vehicle panels, refrigerators, and other ferrous metal surfaces. They will not stick to aluminum, plastic, or fiberglass surfaces commonly found on newer vehicles.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Cut Options for Custom Magnetic Sign Durability

Choose from multiple finishing options to optimize your magnetic sign's performance and appearance. Our cutting options are designed to enhance durability and reduce wind lift for vehicle applications.

Available Cut Options:

  • Rounded Corners (Recommended): Provides better airflow over your magnetic sign and reduces the chances of lifting during vehicle use
  • Square Cut: Clean, professional edges for indoor applications and stationary displays
  • Contour Cut: Custom shape cutting available for unique designs and logos

Vehicle Application Recommendation: Rounded corners are the standard finishing option for vehicle magnetic signs as they provide superior aerodynamics and reduce wind resistance that can cause signs to lift or detach.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Magnetic Sign Production & Turnaround Times

We offer flexible production time ranges from one to five business days, giving you complete control over your project timeline and budget.

  • Perfect for tight timelines and urgent projects
  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day
  • Emergency same-day service available in select cases

  • Popular choice for vehicle fleet applications

Vehicle & Business Applications for Custom Magnetic Signs

Custom magnetic signs offer versatile advertising and identification solutions for businesses, vehicles, and indoor applications.

Popular Vehicle Applications:

  • Business Vehicles: Contractors, delivery services, real estate agents
  • Fleet Advertising: Temporary promotional campaigns and seasonal messaging
  • Personal Vehicles: Small business owners and independent contractors
  • Rental Vehicles: Removable advertising for temporary vehicle use

Business & Indoor Uses:

  • Retail Displays: Refrigerator and metal surface advertising
  • Office Signage: Filing cabinets, metal doors, and equipment labeling
  • Trade Shows: Temporary booth signage on metal display surfaces
  • Warehouse: Safety signs and identification on metal equipment

Promotional Applications: Perfect for temporary campaigns, seasonal promotions, and situations where permanent signage isn't practical or allowed.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Magnetic Sign Artwork Requirements for Full-Color Printing

Proper artwork preparation ensures your custom magnetic signs print with vibrant colors and sharp detail.

Preferred File Formats:

  • Vector Files: .EPS files with fonts converted to outlines (recommended)
  • High-Resolution Raster: .PDF or .JPG files at 300 DPI minimum
  • Design Dimensions: Match your ordered magnetic sign size exactly

Artwork Guidelines:

  • Resolution: Minimum 300 DPI for crisp printing quality
  • Color Mode: CMYK color mode for accurate color reproduction
  • Bleed Area: Include 0.125" bleed around design edges
  • Text Size: Minimum 12-point font size for vehicle readability

Professional Design Support: If you're unsure about your artwork quality, our professional graphic designers can help optimize your files or create custom designs from scratch.

Color Matching: For color-critical projects, we recommend our Color Match Proof System to ensure precise color reproduction. Contact customer service for details about color matching services.

Order Custom Magnetic Signs for Vehicle & Business Use

Ready to promote your business with professional custom magnetic signs? Our durable 30 mil magnetic material with protective lamination provides long-lasting outdoor performance for vehicle advertising and indoor business applications.

Why Choose Our Magnetic Signs:

  • Professional Quality: 30 mil magnetic material with lamination protection
  • Full-Color Printing: Vibrant, eye-catching graphics and text
  • Fast Production: 1-5 business day turnaround options
  • Expert Support: Professional graphic design services available
  • Proven Durability: Weather-resistant for vehicle and outdoor use

Perfect for: Vehicle advertising, business promotions, temporary signage, fleet graphics, and removable displays on any magnetic-receptive surface.

Start designing your custom magnetic signs today using our easy online configurator, or let our professional design team create the perfect solution for your business needs.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Custom Magnetic Signs

What are custom magnetic signs used for?

Custom magnetic signs are primarily used for vehicle advertising, business promotions, and temporary signage. They're perfect for contractors, real estate agents, delivery services, and any business needing removable advertising on vehicles or magnetic surfaces like refrigerators and filing cabinets.

What surfaces do magnetic signs stick to?

Magnetic signs adhere to ferrous metal surfaces including steel vehicle panels, refrigerators, filing cabinets, and metal doors. They will not stick to aluminum, plastic, fiberglass, or non-magnetic surfaces commonly found on some newer vehicles.

Are your custom magnetic signs compatible with vehicles?

Yes, our magnetic signs are specifically designed for vehicle use with durable 30 mil magnetic material and protective lamination. However, they only work on steel vehicle panels. Many newer vehicles have aluminum or plastic body panels where magnets won't adhere.

What cut options do you offer for custom magnetic signs?

We offer rounded corners (recommended for vehicles), square cut, and contour cut options. Rounded corners provide better aerodynamics and reduce wind lift, making them ideal for vehicle applications.

Are your magnetic signs printed in full color?

Yes, all our custom magnetic signs are printed in full color using digital printing technology. We can reproduce vibrant graphics, photographs, and detailed designs with excellent color accuracy.

Do you offer bulk or quantity discounts on magnetic signs?

Yes, we offer competitive pricing for bulk orders. Contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5300 to discuss quantity pricing for your specific magnetic sign needs.

Are magnetic signs weather-resistant?

Yes, our magnetic signs include protective lamination that makes them weather-resistant and suitable for outdoor vehicle use. The lamination protects against UV rays, moisture, and general weather exposure.

How long do magnetic signs last?

With proper care and storage, our laminated magnetic signs can last several years. Lifespan depends on usage conditions, but they typically maintain their appearance and magnetic strength for 3-5 years with regular vehicle use.

Can I write on a magnetic sign?

The laminated surface of our magnetic signs is not designed for writing. If you need writable signage, consider our dry erase magnetic products or contact customer service to discuss custom solutions.

Will magnetic signs damage my vehicle paint?

When properly applied and regularly cleaned, magnetic signs should not damage vehicle paint. We recommend removing signs periodically for cleaning both the sign and vehicle surface, especially in harsh weather conditions.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------

Custom Yard Signs for Outdoor Business & Political Advertising

Durable Corrugated Plastic Yard Signs with Custom Printing & Fast Ordering

PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Choose your custom yard sign size and finishing options. Upload your artwork or let our designers create your professional yard sign for outdoor advertising, political campaigns, real estate listings, and business promotion. PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Personalized Yard Signs for Business & Political Outdoor Display

All signs greater than 32" x 48" in any direction are automatically scored and folded. To score your corrugated plastic signs, we cut through the top layer of the yard sign without cutting through the entire piece. The sign is then folded into an optimal fit to meet shipping guidelines.

If you don't want your yard signs to be scored and folded please visit our oversized flat shipping page or contact one of our customer service representatives at: 320-391-5300.

Please note: When ordering yard signs with different designs, text, imagery, etc., these signs will be priced and processed as 1 sign per design.

Personalized yard signs serve as a flexible advertising solution, frequently placed in front yards for various purposes such as business promotion, political campaigns, real estate listings, and garage sales. These signs are ideal for numerous occasions due to their lightweight nature, simple setup, and affordability compared to other signage methods. Additionally, they effectively convey a brief message to those driving or walking by.

Custom yard signs feature durable 4mm corrugated plastic construction that withstands outdoor weather conditions while maintaining vibrant full-color printing. Available in any custom size from 12" x 12" up to 48" x 96", these signs accommodate business advertising, political campaigns, real estate marketing, and event announcements.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Corrugated Plastic Material for Weather-Resistant Yard Sign Printing

These signs are digitally printed in full color on a 4 mm white corrugated plastic material. This material has hollow flutes in it similar to cardboard, which run horizontally on a 4' x 8' sheet (the 96 in direction.)

The 4 mm corrugated plastic material is durable, lightweight, waterproof, and can be printed single sided or double sided, making this product a great option for outdoor advertising.

Please note, all corrugated plastic yard signs will be cut 1/8th of an inch on each side to allow for finishing. (ex. a 18" x 24" yard sign will actually ship out to you as a 17.75" x 23.75" yard sign.) If your yard sign needs to be precise, please reach out to one of our customer service reps to discuss your specific application.

The corrugated plastic material provides excellent durability for outdoor installations, resisting fading, cracking, and weather damage. This lightweight yet sturdy construction makes yard signs easy to transport and install while maintaining professional appearance throughout extended outdoor display periods.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finishing Options for Custom Yard Sign Installation

The following finishing options are available:

  • 1/2" white margin or full bleed (ink goes all the way to the edge of the sign)
  • Single or double sided signs
  • Yard sign accessories: H Stake 10x15, 10x24 or 10x30, Beefy Stakes, Zip Ties 12 inches - Black and Zip Ties 36 inches - White

Scoring for Large Format Yard Signs

All signs over 32" x 48" or any sign where the H + W is 81 inches or greater are automatically scored and folded. To score your corrugated plastic signs, we cut through the top layer of the yard sign without cutting through the entire piece. The sign is then folded into an optimal fit to meet shipping guidelines.

If you don't want your yard signs to be scored and folded please visit our oversized flat shipping page or contact one of our customer service representatives at: 320-391-5300.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Production & Turnaround Times for Custom Yard Sign Orders

We provide flexible production time ranges for you to choose from. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your order.

1 Business Day Priority

Timelines can be tight. That's why we offer this zippy one day turnaround option.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases
  • Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information

2 Business Days Express

Have an extra day, but still need your products quickly? The express option is ideal for you!

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases
  • Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information

3 Business Days Standard

This is our most popular fast turnaround option. Free and speedy enough for almost any custom order.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases
  • Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information

5 Business Days Saver

If you're not in a rush, then you can save some money by choosing our 5-Days Saver option.

Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time. Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

We accept multiple payment methods to make ordering your custom yard signs convenient and secure. Payment options include major credit cards, PayPal, and business accounts for bulk yard sign orders.

Business accounts are available for political campaigns, real estate agencies, and companies requiring regular yard sign printing services. Contact our customer service team at 320-391-5300 to discuss volume pricing and payment terms for large quantity yard sign orders.

All transactions are processed securely with industry-standard encryption to protect your payment information during the yard sign ordering process.

Custom yard signs ship via standard ground shipping throughout the United States. Expedited shipping options are available for time-sensitive political campaigns, real estate listings, and business promotions.

Yard signs larger than 32" x 48" are automatically scored and folded to meet carrier shipping requirements. This process cuts through the top layer without damaging the sign structure, allowing for compact shipping while maintaining sign integrity.

For flat shipping of oversized yard signs without scoring, please visit our oversized flat shipping page or contact customer service at 320-391-5300 to discuss specialized shipping arrangements.

Tracking information is provided for all yard sign shipments, allowing you to monitor delivery progress and plan for installation timing.

Artwork Requirements for Yard Sign Printing

File Format Guidelines

The file that prints best is .eps converted to outline. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you.

Order Proof Options

If you would like to double-check your order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork, a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information.

Please note that if you request a proof, we will not send your order into production until you have sent your approval.

Color Match Proof System

If your project is color critical, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific project. For more details, please contact a customer service representative.

Design Services Available

Professional graphic design services are available for customers who need assistance creating effective yard sign artwork. Our designers can help with layout, typography, color selection, and message optimization for maximum outdoor visibility and impact.

Ready to promote your business, support your candidate, or advertise your event? Custom yard signs provide cost-effective outdoor advertising that delivers results for political campaigns, real estate marketing, business promotion, and community events.

Choose from flexible production times ranging from 1 to 5 business days, with custom sizing options from 12" x 12" up to 48" x 96". Our durable corrugated plastic material withstands outdoor weather conditions while maintaining vibrant full-color printing throughout extended display periods.

Upload Your Print-Ready File: Choose your product size and upload your completed artwork design for immediate processing.

Let Our Designers Help: Select your yard sign specifications and provide design instructions. Our professional graphic designers will create your custom yard sign artwork.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions

What material are yard signs made out of?

Our custom yard signs are made from 4mm corrugated plastic (also known as corrugated polypropylene or Coroplast). This durable, lightweight, waterproof material features hollow flutes similar to cardboard construction, providing excellent weather resistance for outdoor installations while maintaining vibrant full-color printing quality.

Can I order a double-sided yard sign?

Yes, we offer both single-sided and double-sided yard sign printing options. Double-sided signs are ideal for locations with traffic approaching from multiple directions, maximizing visibility for political campaigns, real estate listings, and business advertising applications.

What is the minimum order quantity for yard signs?

You can order as few as one custom yard sign. There is no minimum order quantity requirement, making our service ideal for both individual customers and large campaigns requiring hundreds of signs.

What are yard signs commonly used for?

Custom yard signs are popular for political campaigns, real estate marketing, business promotions, construction site identification, garage sales, event announcements, directional signage, and community advertising. Their lightweight, weatherproof construction makes them perfect for temporary outdoor installations.

What are the standard yard sign sizes?

Common yard sign sizes include 12" x 18", 18" x 24", 24" x 18", and 24" x 36". However, we specialize in custom sizing, allowing any combination from 12" x 12" minimum up to 48" x 96" maximum to fit your specific advertising needs.

What ground stake options are available for yard signs?

We offer H Stakes in 10x15, 10x24, and 10x30 sizes, plus heavy-duty Beefy Stakes for windy conditions. Installation accessories include 12-inch black zip ties and 36-inch white zip ties for secure mounting to existing posts or structures.

Can I request a proof before printing?

Yes, order proofs are available and include a low-resolution image of your artwork, complete order summary with pricing, and billing/shipping information verification. When you request a proof, production will not begin until you provide approval.

What production times do you offer, and when does turnaround start?

We offer 1-day Priority, 2-day Express, 3-day Standard (most popular), and 5-day Saver production options. Turnaround begins when file upload is complete. If artwork requires prepress review or proof approval, timing starts from final approval confirmation.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------

Frequently Asked Questions About Custom Sintra Signs

What are Sintra signs made of?

Sintra signs are made from rigid PVC foam core material available in 3mm or 6mm thickness. This lightweight yet durable plastic material provides excellent print quality and can be router-cut into custom shapes for unique design applications.

Can I order custom-shaped Sintra signs?

Yes, we offer custom shape cutting for Sintra signs using router-cutting technology. Contact our customer service team to discuss your specific shape requirements and receive a personalized quote for custom-cut Sintra signage.

Can Sintra signs be printed double-sided?

Absolutely! We offer both single-sided and double-sided printing options for Sintra signs. Double-sided printing provides maximum visibility and is perfect for signs that will be viewed from multiple directions.

What colors are used to print Sintra signs?

We use full-color CMYK digital printing to reproduce vibrant, accurate colors on Sintra signs. Our printing process can handle complex designs, photographs, gradients, and any color combination your design requires.

Are Sintra signs suitable for outdoor use?

Yes, Sintra signs are excellent for both indoor and outdoor applications. The material is UV-resistant and weather-durable, making it perfect for outdoor advertising, construction signs, real estate displays, and long-term promotional signage.

How should I store Sintra signs?

Store Sintra signs in a flat position in a cool, dry location away from direct sunlight when not in use. Avoid placing heavy objects on top of stored signs to prevent bending or surface damage.

What are common uses for custom Sintra signs?

Popular applications include business advertising, trade show displays, restaurant menus, real estate signs, construction site signage, promotional cutouts, office displays, and retail point-of-purchase advertising.

Can I request a proof before printing?

Yes, we offer order proofs that include a low-resolution preview of your artwork along with complete order details. For color-critical projects, we also provide a Color Match Proof System to ensure precise color reproduction.

What production times do you offer for Sintra signs?

We offer flexible production timeframes: 2 business days (Express), 3 business days (Standard), and 5 business days (Saver). Production begins once your artwork is approved and uploaded. Emergency same-day rushes may be available in select cases.

What's the maximum size for Sintra signs?

Our maximum print size is 4' x 8'. Signs over 32" x 48" or where height plus width exceeds 81 inches require freight shipping. Contact our team for oversized sign requirements and shipping information.

Order Custom Coroplast A-Frame Signs for Professional Business Display

Our custom coroplast A-frame signs are constructed from durable 4mm corrugated plastic, designed specifically for high-impact business advertising and event promotion. These lightweight, portable signs feature full-color digital printing on both sides, creating maximum visibility for your message from any angle.

Perfect for sidewalk advertising, store promotions, real estate displays, and special events, these weatherproof A-frame signs withstand outdoor conditions while maintaining vibrant color quality. The corrugated plastic construction provides excellent durability while remaining lightweight enough for easy positioning and storage.

Each A-frame sign arrives ready to assemble with simple folding mechanics that require no tools or hardware. The stable base design ensures your sign stays upright in moderate wind conditions, making them ideal for both indoor and outdoor commercial use.

Available in multiple standard sizes with custom sizing options, our coroplast A-frame signs accommodate everything from simple text messages to complex graphic designs. Professional-grade UV-resistant inks ensure your message remains bright and legible even with extended outdoor exposure.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Corrugated Plastic Material for Outdoor A-Frame Signage

Our coroplast A-frame signs are manufactured using premium 4mm corrugated plastic, specifically chosen for its combination of durability, lightweight properties, and excellent printability. This fluted polypropylene material provides superior weather resistance compared to cardboard alternatives while maintaining cost-effectiveness for business advertising applications.

Corrugated Plastic Features:

  • Weather Resistant: Withstands rain, snow, and UV exposure for extended outdoor use
  • Lightweight Construction: Easy to move and reposition while maintaining structural integrity
  • Smooth Print Surface: Accepts high-quality digital printing for crisp text and vibrant graphics
  • Chemical Resistant: Won't deteriorate from exposure to cleaning products or environmental pollutants
  • Recyclable Material: Environmentally responsible choice for temporary and permanent signage
  • Non-Toxic: Safe for use in all commercial and residential environments

The 4mm thickness provides optimal balance between rigidity and flexibility, ensuring your A-frame sign maintains its shape while allowing for compact storage when folded. This material choice makes our coroplast A-frames suitable for both short-term promotional campaigns and long-term business advertising installations.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finishing & Assembly Options for Coroplast A-Frame Signs

Each coroplast A-frame sign includes precision die-cutting and score lines that enable quick assembly without tools or additional hardware. The integrated folding design creates a stable display platform while allowing for compact storage when not in use.

Standard Finishing Features:

  • Double-Sided Printing: Full-color graphics on both front and back panels for maximum visibility
  • Precision Die-Cutting: Clean edges and accurate fold lines for professional appearance
  • Pre-Scored Assembly: Fold lines engineered for easy setup and consistent shape retention
  • Rounded Corners: Safety feature that prevents sharp edges and reduces wear during handling
  • UV-Resistant Inks: Fade-resistant printing technology for extended outdoor durability

Assembly Process:

Your coroplast A-frame arrives flat for shipping efficiency and unfolds into a stable A-frame configuration. The patented fold design locks into position without requiring additional hardware, while still allowing the sign to be folded flat for storage or transport between locations.

Custom sizing and specialty applications are available upon request. Contact our design team for specific dimensional requirements or unique installation needs.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

We provide flexible production time options to accommodate your specific timeline requirements. Production begins once artwork is approved and payment is processed. All timeframes are calculated in business days, excluding weekends and holidays.

Coroplast A-Frame Sign Payment & Ordering Options

All custom coroplast A-frame signs require payment approval before production begins. We offer multiple secure payment methods to accommodate business purchasing procedures and individual customer preferences.

Accepted Payment Methods:

  • Credit Cards: Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover
  • Business Checks: Must be received and cleared before production starts
  • Corporate Accounts: Net terms available for qualified business customers

Payment Processing:

Credit card charges are processed only after you approve your final order details and artwork proof. This ensures complete accuracy before any financial commitment. For check payments, production begins once payment clears our bank, typically 3-5 business days after receipt.

Order Security:

All payment information is processed through secure, encrypted connections. We never store complete credit card information on our systems, ensuring your financial data remains protected throughout the ordering process.

For additional payment options or questions about corporate billing arrangements, contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5300 during business hours.

Shipping Options for Custom Coroplast A-Frame Delivery

Coroplast A-frame signs ship flat in protective packaging to ensure safe delivery and prevent damage during transit. Standard shipping via UPS Ground provides 1-3 day delivery to 90% of the United States, with tracking information provided once your order ships.

Available Shipping Methods:

  • Standard Ground: 3-5 business days, most economical option
  • Three Day Select: 3 business days guaranteed
  • Two Day Express: 2 business days for urgent delivery
  • Overnight: Next business day delivery available
  • UPS Overnight AM: Morning delivery for time-critical projects

Shipping Guidelines:

Shipping costs are calculated based on package weight, dimensions, and destination. Large or multiple A-frame orders may incur additional oversized shipping charges. You will receive tracking information via email once your package is dispatched.

International Shipping:

International delivery available through USPS and UPS services. Customers must provide shipping labels and customs documentation. Contact customer service for specific international shipping requirements and restrictions.

Delivery Protection: Damaged items must be returned for replacement. Lost packages are replaced after carrier confirms loss, typically 7-10 business days after scheduled delivery date.

Business & Event Uses for Coroplast A-Frame Signs

Coroplast A-frame signs provide versatile advertising solutions for businesses, organizations, and events requiring portable, weather-resistant displays. Their lightweight construction and stable base design make them ideal for both temporary promotions and permanent installations.

Popular Business Applications:

  • Retail Storefronts: Daily specials, sales announcements, and store hours
  • Restaurants: Menu highlights, outdoor seating notices, and special promotions
  • Real Estate: Open house directions, property features, and agent contact information
  • Professional Services: Office locations, parking instructions, and service announcements
  • Construction Sites: Safety notices, project information, and contractor identification

Event & Promotional Uses:

  • Trade Shows: Booth identification, product features, and directional signage
  • Farmers Markets: Vendor identification, product pricing, and booth locations
  • Political Campaigns: Candidate promotion, voting information, and event announcements
  • Non-Profit Events: Fundraising information, volunteer directions, and program details
  • Educational Institutions: Campus directions, event promotion, and informational displays

Seasonal Applications:

The weatherproof construction makes coroplast A-frames suitable for year-round outdoor use, from summer festival promotions to winter holiday advertising. Their quick setup and compact storage capabilities make them perfect for businesses with changing promotional needs.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Coroplast A-Frame Sign Artwork Requirements for Printing

Proper artwork preparation ensures your coroplast A-frame sign prints with professional quality and accurate colors. Our design team can assist with file optimization or create custom designs based on your specifications.

Preferred File Formats:

  • Vector Files: .eps, .ai, or .pdf with fonts converted to outlines
  • High-Resolution Images: .jpg, .png, or .tiff at 150 DPI minimum
  • Print-Ready PDFs: With embedded fonts and proper color profiles

Design Specifications:

  • Color Mode: CMYK for accurate print color reproduction
  • Resolution: 150 DPI minimum for crisp text and graphics
  • Bleed Area: 0.125" bleed around all edges for full-coverage designs
  • Safe Zone: Keep important text and graphics 0.25" from edges

Professional Design Services:

If you need assistance with artwork creation or file optimization, our graphic design team can help transform your concept into print-ready artwork. We can work from sketches, existing logos, or detailed specifications to create professional A-frame sign designs.

Proof Process:

Order proofs are available to verify artwork, dimensions, and order details before production. Color-critical projects can utilize our Color Match Proof System for precise color verification. Proofs must be approved before production begins.

For artwork questions or design consultations, contact our customer service team during business hours.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Design & Order Custom Coroplast A-Frame Signs Today

Ready to create professional A-frame signage that drives business results? Our custom coroplast A-frames combine durability, portability, and eye-catching design to deliver maximum advertising impact for your business or event.

Choose from our standard size options or specify custom dimensions to meet your exact requirements. Upload your print-ready artwork or work with our design team to create compelling graphics that capture attention and communicate your message effectively.

With production times from 1-5 business days and nationwide shipping options, you can have professional A-frame signs promoting your business within days of placing your order. Our weatherproof construction ensures your investment continues generating visibility for months or years to come.

Start your order today: Select your preferred size, upload your artwork, and choose your production timeline. Our customer service team is available to assist with sizing questions, artwork optimization, or any special requirements for your coroplast A-frame signs.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Coroplast A-Frame Sign FAQs

What are Coroplast A-frame signs?

Coroplast A-frame signs are portable display signs made from 4mm corrugated plastic that fold into a stable A-frame shape. They feature double-sided full-color printing and are designed for both indoor and outdoor business advertising applications.

What are coroplast sidewalk A-frame signs used for?

These signs are commonly used for retail promotions, restaurant menus, real estate advertising, event announcements, directional signage, and any application requiring portable, weather-resistant displays that can be easily moved and stored.

What material are your coroplast A-frame signs made from?

Our A-frame signs are constructed from 4mm corrugated polypropylene plastic, which provides excellent durability, weather resistance, and printability while remaining lightweight and cost-effective for business advertising needs.

Are Coroplast A-frame signs printed in full color?

Yes, all our coroplast A-frame signs feature full-color digital printing on both sides using UV-resistant inks that maintain vibrant colors even with extended outdoor exposure.

Are your coroplast A-frame signs double-sided?

Yes, every A-frame sign includes full-color printing on both the front and back panels, providing maximum visibility and advertising impact from any viewing angle.

Are coroplast A-frame signs weatherproof for outdoor use?

Yes, the corrugated plastic material and UV-resistant inks make these signs suitable for extended outdoor use in various weather conditions including rain, snow, and direct sunlight.

Will wind knock over a coroplast outdoor A-frame sign?

The A-frame design provides good stability in moderate wind conditions. For areas with consistently strong winds, additional weighting or securing may be recommended to prevent tipping.

What sizes do your coroplast A-frame signs come in?

We offer multiple standard sizes and can accommodate custom sizing requirements. Contact our customer service team for specific dimensions and pricing for your project needs.

Do you provide coroplast A-frame templates?

Yes, we provide design templates for all standard sizes to help you create properly formatted artwork. Templates include safe zones, bleed areas, and fold line indicators.

How do I set up and store a coroplast A-frame sign?

The signs arrive flat and unfold easily along pre-scored lines to form a stable A-frame shape. No tools or hardware are required. For storage, simply fold the sign flat along the same score lines.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------

Weather-Resistant Yard Sign Material for Outdoor Installations

Custom yard signs are a versatile promotional tool most commonly displayed in front lawns for business advertising, political promotion, real estate showings, and yard sales. Lawn signs are perfect for so many different events because they're lightweight, easy to install, and inexpensive when compared to other signage options. They're also incredibly effective at sharing a quick message with passing cars and pedestrians.

These signs are digitally printed in full color on durable 4mm white corrugated plastic material. This material has hollow flutes similar to cardboard, running horizontally on a 4' x 8' sheet. The 4mm corrugated plastic material is durable, lightweight, waterproof, and can be printed single sided or double sided, making this product ideal for outdoor advertising applications.

Here at Banners.com, we make designing, ordering, and displaying your yard sign easy with free online templates, an intuitive online designer, and real-time tracking for your order. You can also add wire installation stakes to accommodate your single or double-sided yard sign for secure property display.

Note: All coroplast yard signs are cut 1/8th of an inch on each side for finishing. A 18" x 24" yard sign will measure 17.75" x 23.75" when shipped. If precise dimensions are required, please contact our customer service team to discuss your specific application.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Weather-Resistant Yard Sign Material for Outdoor Installations

Our custom yard signs are printed on premium 4mm white corrugated plastic (coroplast) material, specifically designed for outdoor durability and professional appearance.

Material Specifications

  • Thickness: 4mm corrugated plastic with hollow flutes for lightweight strength
  • Weather Resistance: Waterproof and UV-resistant for long-term outdoor display
  • Print Surface: Smooth white surface optimized for vibrant full-color printing
  • Durability: Resistant to cracking, fading, and weather damage
  • Weight: Lightweight construction for easy installation and handling

Flute Direction

The corrugated flutes run horizontally on standard 4' x 8' sheets (96" direction), providing optimal strength for yard sign applications and proper drainage of moisture.

This material choice ensures your yard signs maintain their professional appearance and structural integrity throughout extended outdoor display periods, making them ideal for real estate, political campaigns, business promotion, and event advertising.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Yard Sign Finishing & Installation Options for Property Display

Print Finishing Options

  • Margin Options: 1/2" white margin or full bleed printing (ink to edge)
  • Printing Sides: Single-sided or double-sided printing available
  • Color: Full-color digital printing for vibrant, professional results

Installation Accessories

Professional installation accessories available to secure your yard signs:

  • H Stakes: Available for 10x15, 10x24, or 10x30 yard signs
  • Beefy Stakes: Heavy-duty option for challenging ground conditions
  • Zip Ties: 12-inch black or 36-inch white for additional mounting options

Large Format Scoring

Signs over 32" x 48" (or total dimensions exceeding 81") are automatically scored and folded for shipping efficiency. We cut through the top layer without penetrating the entire sign, then fold for optimal packaging.

If you require oversized signs without scoring, please contact our customer service team at 320-391-5300 or visit our oversized flat shipping options.

Optimal File Formats

Color Matching Services

Design Assistance Available

Frequently Asked Questions About Custom Yard Signs

What are yard signs and how are they used?

Yard signs are lightweight, weather-resistant corrugated plastic signs designed for outdoor display on lawns, properties, and public spaces. They're commonly used for real estate listings, political campaigns, business advertising, event promotion, and community announcements. Their durability and easy installation make them ideal for temporary and semi-permanent outdoor messaging.

What material are your custom yard signs printed on?

Our yard signs are printed on premium 4mm white corrugated plastic (coroplast) material. This waterproof, UV-resistant material features hollow flutes for lightweight strength and is specifically designed for outdoor durability. The smooth white surface provides excellent print quality for vibrant full-color graphics and text.

What are the most common yard sign sizes available?

Popular yard sign sizes include 12" x 18", 18" x 24", and 24" x 36" for standard residential and commercial use. We also offer custom sizing for specific applications. Signs larger than 32" x 48" are automatically scored and folded for shipping, while smaller sizes ship flat.

Can my yard signs be printed with double-sided graphics?

Yes, we offer both single-sided and double-sided printing for all yard sign sizes. Double-sided printing is ideal when your sign will be viewed from multiple directions, such as on corner properties or in high-traffic areas where visibility from both sides increases your message impact.

Do you offer bulk pricing for large yard sign orders?

Yes, volume discounts are available for bulk yard sign orders. This makes large orders cost-effective for political campaigns, real estate agencies, business chains, and community organizations. Contact our customer service team at 320-391-5300 for specific bulk pricing information.

What production times do you offer for yard signs?

We offer flexible production times ranging from 1 to 5 business days: 1-day Priority for urgent needs, 2-day Express for quick turnaround, 3-day Standard (most popular), and 5-day Saver for cost-effective orders. Turnaround begins when artwork upload is complete and approved.

Do yard signs include installation stakes?

Installation stakes are available as add-on accessories during ordering. We offer H-stakes for various sign sizes (10x15, 10x24, 10x30), heavy-duty Beefy stakes for challenging ground conditions, and zip ties for fence mounting. Stakes are ordered separately to accommodate different installation needs.

Can I display yard signs without ground stakes?

Yes, yard signs can be mounted using various methods beyond ground stakes. Options include zip-tie attachment to fences, adhesive mounting to smooth surfaces, insertion into existing sign frames, or leaning against structures. The lightweight corrugated material is versatile for multiple display methods.

Are yard signs weather-resistant for long-term outdoor use?

Yes, our 4mm corrugated plastic material is waterproof and UV-resistant, designed to withstand outdoor weather conditions including rain, sun exposure, and moderate wind. For optimal longevity, store signs indoors during extreme weather and clean with mild soap and water when needed. Proper care extends their usable life significantly.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------

Frequently Asked Questions

What do people call an A-frame sign?

A-frame signs are also commonly called sandwich board signs, sidewalk signs, or sidewalk sandwich boards. These portable advertising displays get their name from their distinctive A-shaped frame structure that holds changeable sign panels.

What are A-frame signs made of?

Our A-frame signs use 4mm corrugated plastic (Coroplast) sign panels printed in full color and paired with sturdy aluminum or plastic sign holders. The corrugated plastic material provides excellent durability, weather resistance, and lightweight portability for sidewalk advertising.

Are A-frame signs waterproof and weather-resistant?

Yes—these signs are completely waterproof and designed specifically for outdoor use. The corrugated plastic construction resists water absorption, and the signs are engineered to be weather- and wind-resistant for reliable performance in all seasons.

Are A-frame signs double-sided?

Yes—double-sided A-frame signs are available and recommended for maximum visibility from both pedestrian and vehicle traffic directions. You can use identical graphics on both sides or create different messages for varied advertising approaches.

What is the largest A-frame sign size available?

The largest standard A-frame sign size is 36" × 24", available with both Signicade and Signicade Deluxe frame systems. Custom sizes may be available for special applications—contact customer service for sizing options beyond standard dimensions.

Can I order replacement signs for my A-frame frame?

Yes—replacement signs are readily available and designed for easy installation in existing A-frame holders. This allows you to update your advertising message for new promotions, seasonal changes, or menu updates without purchasing new frames.

Can I design my A-frame sign online?

Yes—create your custom A-frame sign using our online design tool with templates, fonts, and graphics library. You can also upload your own completed artwork files during the ordering process for maximum design flexibility.

Can I request a proof and what are your production times?

Yes—request a PDF proof during checkout for design review before production begins. Production options range from 1–5 business days after proof approval. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST begin production the next business day, and total delivery time includes both production and shipping time.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------

Frequently Asked Questions

What are styrene signs?

Styrene signs are printed on lightweight PVC plastic sheets available in 0.03" flexible or 0.06" rigid thicknesses. These durable signs feature UV-resistant inks and are suitable for both indoor and outdoor applications, providing 3-5 years of outdoor durability when properly installed.

Can I order custom-shaped styrene signs?

Yes, we offer custom die-cutting services for unique shapes and designs. Custom-shaped styrene signs are perfect for logos, branded displays, and creative applications that require more than standard rectangular formats.

Can styrene signs be printed double-sided?

Absolutely! Double-sided printing is available for styrene signs that will be viewed from multiple angles. This option is ideal for window displays, freestanding installations, and applications where both sides of the sign will be visible.

What colors are used to print styrene signs?

We use full-color CMYK printing with UV-resistant inks that maintain vibrant colors and sharp detail. Our printing process can reproduce virtually any color and supports full-color photographic images, gradients, and complex graphics.

Can styrene signs be used outdoors?

Yes, styrene signs can be used outdoors. While we recommend indoor use for maximum longevity, our UV-resistant inks allow outdoor installation with 3-5 years of color retention when properly installed and maintained.

How should I store styrene signs?

Store styrene signs in a clean, dry environment away from direct sunlight and extreme temperatures. Flexible 0.03" signs can be rolled for compact storage, while rigid 0.06" signs should be stored flat to prevent warping or damage.

What are common uses for styrene signs?

Styrene signs are versatile for retail displays, office signage, trade show graphics, restaurant menus, real estate marketing, construction site signage, event displays, and educational materials. They're ideal for both temporary and permanent installations.

Can I request a proof before printing?

Yes, we offer digital proofs that include a low-resolution image preview and complete order summary. For color-critical projects, we also provide physical Color Match Proofs to ensure accurate color reproduction before final production.

What production times do you offer, and when does turnaround start?

We offer 1, 2, 3, and 5+ business day production options. Turnaround begins when your artwork upload is complete and approved. Orders requiring prepress review or proof approval begin production upon final approval confirmation.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------

Custom Magnet Material Specifications & Surface Compatibility

Our custom magnets are manufactured using premium materials designed for durability and professional presentation across various applications.

Standard 30 Mil Magnetic Material: Our primary magnetic substrate provides strong adhesion to ferromagnetic surfaces including steel, iron, nickel, and cobalt. This material offers reliable holding power for vehicle applications and indoor magnetic surfaces.

Reflective 30 Mil Magnetic Material: Enhanced visibility option featuring reflective properties for improved safety and visibility during low-light conditions, particularly beneficial for vehicle advertising applications.

Laminated Surface Protection: Both material options include water-resistant and scratch-resistant laminated surfaces that protect your custom graphics from outdoor elements and daily handling.

Surface Compatibility: Magnets adhere to ferromagnetic metals only. They will not stick to aluminum, fiberglass, carbon fiber, plastic, or most non-magnetic stainless steel surfaces. We recommend testing a small area before full application on vehicle surfaces.

Full Color CMYK Printing: Your custom designs are printed using full-color CMYK digital printing technology, ensuring accurate color reproduction and sharp detail resolution for professional presentation.

Precision Die-Cutting: Custom shapes and sizes are available through precision cutting processes that maintain clean edges and exact dimensional specifications for your magnetic applications.

Edge Sealing: Finished edges prevent moisture infiltration and extend the lifespan of your custom magnets, particularly important for vehicle applications exposed to weather conditions.

Custom Magnet Production & Delivery Information

Magnetic Material Compatibility with Vehicle Surfaces

Magnets only stick to magnetic (ferromagnetic) metal, such as steel, iron, nickel, and cobalt. They won't stick to aluminum, fiberglass, carbon fiber, plastic, or most non-magnetic stainless steel.

Custom Magnet Construction & Material Specifications

Our magnets are made with standard 30 mil magnetic material or reflective 30 mil magnetic material. Both options are finished with a water- and scratch-resistant laminated surface for added durability.

Weather Resistance for Outdoor Custom Magnet Applications

They're water-resistant, not fully waterproof. Light rain and normal outdoor use are fine, but we recommend removing magnets before car washes and avoiding trapped moisture underneath.

Custom Magnet Durability & Lifespan Expectations

With proper use and care, our magnets can last up to 5 years.

Minimum Order Requirements for Custom Magnet Orders

No. There's no minimum order—you can order one magnet or buy in bulk.

Bulk Pricing Options for Large Custom Magnet Orders

Yes. Pricing is quantity-based—ordering more lowers the per-unit cost (you'll see the discount update as you increase quantity).

Full Color Printing Capabilities for Custom Magnets

Yes. All magnets are printed in full CMYK color.

Writing & Cleaning Instructions for Custom Magnets

Yes. Use Sharpie for permanent text and dry-erase markers for temporary notes. To remove marker, clean gently with mild soap/water or a light cleaning solution (test a small area first).

Common Business Applications for Custom Magnets

Popular uses include car/truck magnets for advertising, business card magnets for handouts or mailers, and refrigerator magnets for calendars, reminders, lists, and photos.

Frequently Asked Questions About Custom Truck Magnets

Will a magnetic truck sign damage my paint?

No, properly maintained magnetic truck signs will not damage your vehicle's paint. Remove magnets periodically for cleaning both the magnet and vehicle surface. Dirt or debris trapped between the magnet and paint could potentially cause scratching, so regular cleaning prevents any issues.

What metals do magnetic signs stick to?

Magnetic truck signs adhere to ferrous (steel) surfaces only. They will stick to most truck doors, tailgates, and steel body panels. Magnets will not stick to aluminum, plastic, fiberglass, or stainless steel surfaces commonly found on some modern vehicles.

Can I use magnetic truck signs on other vehicles?

Yes, truck magnets work on any vehicle with steel body panels, including cars, vans, trailers, and commercial vehicles. Always test a small area first to ensure magnetic compatibility before placing your full order.

What size truck magnet should I order?

Consider your vehicle's available flat surface area and viewing distance for optimal readability. Larger magnets (18" x 24") provide maximum visibility for highway driving, while smaller sizes work well for local driving and detailed information display.

How durable are magnetic truck signs?

Our truck magnets are built for long-term outdoor use with 30 mil magnetic material and protective lamination. With proper care and periodic cleaning, they can last several years while maintaining strong magnetic hold and vibrant colors.

Are magnets better than stickers/decals for truck advertising?

Magnetic signs offer flexibility that permanent decals cannot match. Remove them for personal vehicle use, transfer between vehicles, or update designs without residue or paint damage. Choose magnets for versatility or decals for permanent, lower-cost solutions.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------

Frequently Asked Questions

Can I use my own artwork or photos for my custom photo magnets?

Yes, you can upload your own photos and artwork for custom photo magnet printing. We accept high-resolution JPG, PNG, PDF, and EPS files. For best results, submit photos with at least 150 DPI at the final print size.

What material are your photo magnets made from?

Our photo magnets are printed on durable 30 mil magnetic material with included lamination for weather resistance. This material provides strong magnetic attraction while protecting your printed photos from moisture and UV exposure.

Do your photo magnets use photo paper?

No, we print directly onto magnetic material using professional digital printing processes. This creates a more durable product than traditional photo paper magnets, with better weather resistance and longer lifespan.

Can I choose different cut shapes for my photo magnets?

Yes, we offer rounded corners (recommended), square cut, and custom contour cutting options. Rounded corners provide better airflow and adhesion for outdoor use, while square cuts offer clean professional edges.

What surfaces do magnets stick to best?

Photo magnets work best on ferrous metal surfaces like refrigerators, filing cabinets, magnetic whiteboards, and steel doors. They will not stick to aluminum, plastic, or non-magnetic metal surfaces.

Can photo magnets get wet?

Yes, our photo magnets include lamination protection that makes them suitable for indoor and outdoor use. They can withstand moisture, light rain, and humidity without damage to the printed image.

Can I write on my magnet?

The laminated surface of our photo magnets is not designed for writing. If you need writable magnetic material, consider our dry erase magnets or contact customer service for custom options.

How long do photo magnets last?

With proper care and appropriate surface application, our photo magnets can last several years outdoors and indefinitely indoors. The lamination protection helps prevent fading and weather damage.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------

Frequently Asked Questions About Custom Refrigerator Magnets

What surfaces do refrigerator magnets stick to?

Custom refrigerator magnets stick to ferrous metal surfaces including refrigerators, freezers, filing cabinets, magnetic whiteboards, and steel surfaces. They will not adhere to aluminum, plastic, or non-magnetic metal surfaces. Test the surface with a small magnet before ordering if you're unsure.

What materials are custom refrigerator magnets made from?

Our refrigerator magnets are made from durable 30 mil magnetic material with professional lamination. This construction provides strong magnetic hold while protecting the printed surface from moisture, fading, and wear through regular use.

Are custom refrigerator magnets weather-resistant?

Yes, the lamination process makes our refrigerator magnets resistant to moisture, temperature changes, and normal kitchen environments. While designed for indoor use, they can withstand typical household conditions including humidity and temperature variations.

What cut shapes are available for refrigerator magnets?

We offer three cut options: rounded corners (recommended for better durability), square cut for clean edges, and custom contour cutting to match your design shape. Rounded corners help prevent lifting and provide better airflow around the magnet edges.

Can I upload my own artwork for refrigerator magnets?

Yes, you can upload your own artwork files. We recommend vector-based files like .EPS with outlined fonts, or high-resolution .PDF and .JPG files at 300 DPI minimum. Our design team can review your files and provide recommendations for optimal print quality.

Is there a minimum order quantity for refrigerator magnets?

We accommodate both small and large quantity orders for custom refrigerator magnets. Contact customer service for specific minimum quantities and to discuss your project requirements.

Do you offer bulk pricing for refrigerator magnets?

Yes, volume discounts are available for larger refrigerator magnet orders. The more you order, the better your per-unit pricing. Contact our sales team to discuss bulk pricing for your specific quantity requirements.

How long do custom refrigerator magnets last?

With proper care, custom refrigerator magnets made from our 30 mil material with lamination can last for years. The magnetic strength remains consistent, and the laminated surface protects against fading, moisture, and normal wear from handling.

Can I write on refrigerator magnets with markers?

The laminated surface is not designed for writing with standard markers or pens. If you need writable refrigerator magnets, consider our dry erase magnet options or contact customer service to discuss specialized surface treatments for your application.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions

What surfaces do car magnets stick to?

Car magnets adhere to ferrous (magnetic-receptive) metal surfaces such as steel vehicle doors, hoods, and trunk areas. They will not stick to aluminum body panels, plastic parts, or non-ferrous metals. Most vehicle doors provide excellent magnetic adhesion.

Do car magnets work on all vehicles?

Car magnets work on vehicles with steel body panels. Many modern vehicles use aluminum or plastic body components where magnets won't adhere. Test a small magnet on your intended surface before ordering to ensure compatibility.

What materials are your car magnets made from?

Our car magnets use 30 mil thick magnetic material with protective lamination included. This thickness provides strong adhesion while remaining flexible for easy application and removal. The lamination protects against UV damage and weather exposure.

Are car magnets weather-resistant?

Yes, our car magnets include protective lamination that provides excellent weather resistance, UV protection, and durability for long-term outdoor use. They perform well in rain, snow, and extreme temperatures.

Can I upload my own artwork for a car magnet?

Absolutely! You can upload your own print-ready artwork during the ordering process. We accept vector files (.eps, .ai) and high-resolution raster files (.pdf, .jpg, .png). Our prepress team reviews all files to ensure optimal print quality.

Is there a minimum order quantity for car magnets?

No minimum order quantity is required. You can order a single car magnet or hundreds depending on your needs. Pricing may vary based on quantity ordered.

Do you offer bulk discounts?

Yes, quantity discounts are available for larger orders. Contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5300 to discuss bulk pricing options for your specific project requirements.

How long do car magnets last?

With proper care and installation, our car magnets can last several years. The protective lamination helps prevent fading and wear. Lifespan depends on usage conditions, storage, and maintenance practices.

Can I leave my car magnet on in the car wash?

We recommend removing car magnets before entering automatic car washes. High-pressure water and brushes can cause magnets to shift or come off. Hand washing around magnets is acceptable, or remove them during washing.

Can I write on a car magnet?

The laminated surface is not designed for writing. For variable information, consider ordering multiple magnets with different text, or look into dry-erase magnetic products specifically designed for writing applications.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------

Frequently Asked Questions

What are your custom dry erase magnets made of?

Our dry erase magnets are made with 30 mil magnetic material and include protective lamination. This combination provides strong magnetic adhesion and a durable writing surface that works with standard dry erase markers and erases cleanly.

Do you offer custom sizes and custom shapes for dry erase magnets?

Yes, we can create dry erase magnets in custom sizes up to 24" x 24". We also offer contour cutting for custom shapes. Square cut and rounded corner options are available, with rounded corners recommended for better durability.

Can I upload my own artwork for a custom dry erase magnet?

Absolutely! You can upload your own print-ready files in .eps, .pdf, or high-resolution .jpg formats. Vector files with fonts converted to outlines provide the best print quality. Our design team can also help optimize your artwork.

What's the difference between standard and reflective custom dry erase magnets?

Our standard dry erase magnets feature full-color printing on magnetic material with protective lamination. We focus on providing the highest quality standard dry erase magnets rather than specialty reflective options.

What are common uses for dry erase fridge magnets?

Popular uses include meal planning, family chore charts, shopping lists, weekly schedules, goal tracking, and any reusable organizational system. They're perfect for kitchens, offices, classrooms, and anywhere you need flexible planning tools.

What surfaces do dry erase magnets stick to best?

Dry erase magnets work best on steel surfaces like refrigerators, filing cabinets, whiteboards, and magnetic boards. They will not stick to aluminum, plastic, or non-ferrous materials. Test with a regular magnet if you're unsure about surface compatibility.

Is there a minimum order quantity for custom dry erase magnets?

We can accommodate single custom dry erase magnets as well as large quantity orders. Contact customer service for pricing on bulk orders or special quantity requirements.

Can I use custom dry erase magnets on a vehicle or outdoors?

While our dry erase magnets are durable, they're designed primarily for indoor applications like refrigerators and office environments. For outdoor or vehicle use, consider our dedicated magnetic signs which are specifically engineered for those conditions.

Are dry erase fridge magnets waterproof?

Our dry erase magnets include protective lamination that provides moisture resistance for typical indoor use. They can handle kitchen humidity and light cleaning, but they're not designed for submersion or heavy water exposure.

What markers can I use on a custom dry erase magnet (and how do I clean it)?

Use standard dry erase markers for best results. Clean with a dry cloth or standard whiteboard eraser for regular maintenance. For deeper cleaning, use whiteboard cleaner or mild soap with a soft cloth. Avoid abrasive cleaners that could damage the laminated surface.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
