Business Magnet FAQ

What material are your business magnets made from?

Our business magnets are made from 30 mil magnetic material with protective lamination. This thickness provides excellent holding power while remaining flexible enough to conform to vehicle surfaces and curved applications.

Can I upload my own artwork for custom business magnets?

Yes, you can upload your own artwork files. We accept vector files (.EPS, .AI), high-resolution PDFs, and image files (.JPG, .PNG) at 300 DPI. Our prepress team reviews all artwork to ensure optimal print quality before production.

What cut options are available for custom business magnets?

We offer three cut options: rounded corners (recommended for vehicles), square cut (standard applications), and custom contour cut (shaped to your design). Rounded corners help prevent wind lift during vehicle use.

Can my business magnet be cut to the shape of my logo or design?

Yes, we offer custom contour cutting to match your logo or design shape. This creates a unique appearance and enhanced visual impact. Contact our customer service team to discuss your specific contour cutting requirements.

What surfaces do business magnets stick to best?

Business magnets adhere to ferrous (magnetic) metal surfaces including steel vehicle doors, refrigerators, filing cabinets, and steel building surfaces. They will not stick to aluminum, plastic, fiberglass, or non-magnetic materials.

What are business magnets commonly used for?

Business magnets are popular for vehicle advertising, trade show displays, refrigerator marketing, office signage, and promotional giveaways. They're ideal for contractors, real estate agents, delivery services, and any business needing removable advertising.

Can I write on a business magnet?

Our business magnets have a laminated surface that is not designed for writing. For the best appearance and durability, we recommend including all text and graphics in your printed design rather than adding handwritten information.

How long do custom business magnets last?

With proper care and application, business magnets can last several years outdoors. The laminated surface protects against UV rays and moisture. Lifespan depends on environmental conditions, surface preparation, and usage frequency.

Bumper Magnet Finishing Options for Secure Vehicle Mounting

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions

Will a bumper magnet stick to my vehicle?

Bumper magnets stick only to steel vehicle surfaces. Many modern vehicles use aluminum or plastic body panels where magnets won't adhere. Test your vehicle's surface with a small magnet before ordering. Magnetic signs work best on older vehicles and commercial trucks with steel body panels.

What material are your bumper magnets made from?

Our bumper magnets use 30 mil magnetic material with protective lamination. This heavyweight magnetic stock provides strong adhesion to steel vehicle surfaces while maintaining flexibility for curved bumper installation. The laminated surface protects against UV damage, weather, and scratching during vehicle use.

Can I upload my own artwork for a bumper magnet?

Yes, you can upload vector files (.eps), high-resolution PDFs, or JPEG images for custom printing. Vector files with fonts converted to outlines produce the best results. If you need design assistance, our professional graphic design team can create vehicle advertising layouts using your logo and content.

Can I choose different cut shapes for my bumper magnets?

We offer three finishing options: rounded corners (recommended for highway driving), square cut for clean edges, and contour cut following your design shape. Rounded corners provide better aerodynamics and secure mounting for vehicles driven at highway speeds.

Is there a minimum order quantity for bumper magnets?

No minimum order quantity required. You can order single bumper magnets for personal use or large quantities for business fleet vehicles and promotional campaigns. Bulk pricing is available for larger vehicle advertising orders.

Do you offer bulk pricing?

Yes, bulk pricing is available for large quantity orders. Contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5300 for volume pricing on fleet vehicle magnets, political campaign orders, or business promotional quantities.

How long do bumper magnets last?

With proper care and installation on compatible vehicle surfaces, bumper magnets can last several years. The laminated material protects against UV fading and weather damage. Longevity depends on driving conditions, vehicle maintenance, and proper installation on steel surfaces.

Are bumper magnets safe for painted surfaces?

Yes, magnetic vehicle signs are safe for painted steel surfaces when properly maintained. Remove magnets periodically for cleaning to prevent dirt buildup that could cause scratching. Clean both the magnet and vehicle surface before reapplication to maintain paint protection.

Are bumper magnets okay to go through a car wash?

Remove bumper magnets before automatic car washes to prevent damage or loss. High-pressure water and brushes can dislodge magnetic signs. Hand washing around magnetic signs is acceptable, but removal during car wash visits protects both the magnet and your vehicle's finish.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------

Business Card Printing FAQ

What is the standard business card size in the US?

Standard US business cards measure 3.5" x 2" and are printed on premium 12.4 pt, 120 lb. coverstock paper with your choice of glossy or matte coating finish.

What's the difference between matte and gloss business cards?

Glossy business cards provide vibrant color reproduction and a premium, polished appearance ideal for colorful designs and photography. Matte business cards offer an elegant, non-reflective finish that's easy to write on and provides a sophisticated, professional look.

How thick are your business cards?

Our business cards are printed on 12.4 pt, 120 lb. coverstock paper, providing substantial thickness and professional feel for networking and business applications while maintaining durability for frequent handling.

How do I design a business card?

You can upload your own print-ready design files or take advantage of our professional design services. We recommend vector-based files (.eps with outlined fonts) or high-resolution PDFs. Our graphic designers are available at $60 per hour for custom business card creation and optimization.

What information should I include on a business card?

Essential business card information includes your name, job title, company name, phone number, email address, and website. Consider adding your company logo, physical address (if relevant), and social media handles. Keep the design clean and readable for maximum networking effectiveness.

Table Cover FAQ

What are custom table covers?

Custom table covers are fabric tablecloths designed to cover event and display tables for a clean, branded look. They feature full-color printing of your logos, graphics, and messaging to create professional displays for trade shows, corporate events, and special occasions.

What material are your table covers made from?

Our table covers are made from banner soft fabric, a premium polyester blend specifically designed for professional event displays. This material is durable, machine washable, and optimized for vibrant color reproduction through our direct dye sublimation printing process.

Are table covers machine washable?

Yes—our table covers are machine washable on a gentle/light cycle in cold water, similar to caring for a standard tablecloth. Air dry first, then tumble dry on low heat if needed to remove wrinkles. This makes them perfect for repeated use at multiple events.

Are table covers printed in full color?

Yes—table covers are digitally printed in full CMYK color using direct dye sublimation technology. This process ensures vibrant, permanent colors that penetrate the fabric fibers rather than sitting on the surface, resulting in superior color retention and durability.

What are table covers commonly used for?

Table covers are most commonly used for trade show booths, corporate events, job fairs, and conferences. They're also popular for weddings, graduations, anniversary parties, craft fairs, and event gift tables. They provide professional branding while protecting tables from minor scuffs during displays.

What is the minimum order quantity for table covers?

There's no minimum order requirement—you can order as few as one table cover or as many as 1,000 or more. This flexibility makes custom table covers accessible for small businesses and large corporations alike.

Do you offer bulk pricing for table covers?

Yes—bulk discounts are automatically applied as your quantity increases. The per-cover price decreases significantly for larger orders, making them cost-effective for companies that participate in multiple events throughout the year or need covers for multiple booth locations.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------

Banner Accessory Specifications & Requirements

Understanding proper accessory specifications ensures you select the right hardware for your specific banner installation requirements.

Grommet Compatibility

Our hanging clips and ball bungees work with standard banner grommets (1/2" diameter). Ensure your banners include grommets spaced appropriately for your chosen hardware.

Weight Load Guidelines

Each accessory type supports different banner weights and wind loads. Ball bungees handle up to 15 lb banners, while heavy-duty clips support banners up to 25 lbs.

Stake Size Selection

Choose H-stake sizes based on your sign dimensions:

  • 10" x 15" stakes: Signs up to 18" x 24"
  • 10" x 24" stakes: Signs up to 24" x 36"
  • 10" x 30" stakes: Signs 36" and larger

Installation Spacing

Space hanging hardware every 3-4 feet along banner edges for optimal support. Use additional attachment points for banners over 10 feet in length.

Ground Condition Considerations

Select appropriate stakes based on soil conditions. Beefy stakes work best in hard or rocky soil, while standard H-stakes suit normal ground conditions.

Banner Accessories & Installation Hardware - Frequently Asked Questions

What banner accessories do I need for outdoor installation?

For outdoor banner installation, we recommend ball bungees or hanging clips for fence mounting, and appropriate H-stakes or beefy stakes for ground-mounted signs. The specific accessories depend on your installation surface and banner size.

How do I choose the right stake size for my yard sign?

Select stake size based on your sign dimensions: 10" x 15" stakes for signs up to 18" x 24", 10" x 24" stakes for signs up to 24" x 36", and 10" x 30" stakes for signs 36" and larger.

Can banner accessories be used with any banner material?

Yes, our accessories work with vinyl banners, mesh banners, and fabric banners. Ensure your banner includes grommets for use with hanging clips and ball bungees.

How many ball bungees do I need for my banner?

Use one ball bungee for every 3-4 feet of banner length, with a minimum of 4 bungees for any banner. Larger banners or high-wind areas may require additional attachment points.

Are banner magnets strong enough for vehicle use?

Yes, our banner magnets are designed for vehicle mounting and provide secure attachment to metal surfaces. They work well for temporary vehicle displays and metal fence installations.

Do you offer bulk pricing for large accessory orders?

Yes, volume discounts are available for orders over 100 pieces. Contact our customer service team at 866.419.7446 for custom bulk pricing.

How long do banner accessories last outdoors?

Our accessories are designed for extended outdoor use. Galvanized stakes resist corrosion for years, while UV-treated ball bungees maintain elasticity through multiple seasons of outdoor exposure.

Can I order accessories separately from banners?

Absolutely. All banner accessories can be purchased individually or added to any banner order. Most items ship same-day from our warehouse inventory.

Check payments are also accepted and must be received before production begins. Corporate accounts and bulk poster orders can arrange alternative payment terms through customer service consultation.

Credit card charges are processed only after final order approval, providing opportunity to review all specifications, pricing, and delivery details. This ensures complete accuracy before financial commitment.

Volume discounts apply to large quantity poster orders, and corporate billing arrangements are available for repeat customers with established accounts.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Custom Poster Delivery

Standard shipping via UPS Ground provides 1-3 day delivery to 90% of the United States. Tracking information is provided immediately upon shipment for complete delivery visibility.

Shipping costs are calculated based on package weight and destination. Large poster orders may incur additional shipping charges due to size and packaging requirements.

Expedited shipping options including UPS Next Day Air and 2-Day Air are available for urgent poster delivery requirements. International shipping is supported with proper customs documentation and approved shipping labels.

Damaged goods during shipping are replaced upon return of damaged items. Lost packages are replaced after shipping carrier confirms loss, typically within 7-10 business days of scheduled delivery.

Custom poster orders ship from our Minnesota facility, ensuring consistent quality control and reliable delivery scheduling throughout the continental United States.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Indoor Advertising & Promotional Uses for Custom Posters

Custom posters excel in retail environments for promotional displays, sale announcements, and product advertising. The high-resolution printing captures detailed product images and promotional text with professional clarity.

Restaurant applications include menu displays, daily specials, and promotional campaigns. The food-safe materials and easy cleaning capabilities make posters ideal for dining establishments and commercial kitchens.

Trade show and conference applications benefit from lightweight construction and vibrant graphics that attract attention in competitive display environments. Easy transportation and quick setup make posters perfect for mobile marketing.

Educational institutions use custom posters for informational displays, event promotion, and classroom materials. The cost-effective pricing allows for frequent updates and seasonal campaigns.

Fine art reproductions and photography displays showcase the high-resolution printing capabilities, making custom posters suitable for galleries, offices, and decorative applications.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Poster Artwork Requirements for High-Resolution Printing

Vector-based file formats including .eps with outlined fonts provide optimal print quality for custom posters. These scalable formats ensure crisp edges and consistent color reproduction across all poster sizes.

High-resolution .pdf and .jpg files are also acceptable, with minimum 300 DPI resolution recommended for professional print quality. Our prepress team reviews all artwork to ensure optimal printing results.

Order Proof Options

Request order proofs to verify artwork placement, color accuracy, and order specifications before production begins. Proofs include low-resolution artwork preview, complete order summary, and billing information for final approval.

Color Match Proof System

Color-critical projects benefit from our advanced color matching system that ensures precise color reproduction. This service provides the highest level of color accuracy for brand-sensitive applications.

Professional graphic design assistance is available for artwork optimization, file format conversion, and design consultation to ensure your custom poster achieves maximum visual impact.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Posters for Professional Indoor Displays

Transform your marketing campaigns and indoor displays with high-quality custom posters printed on premium paper stock. Our advanced printing technology delivers vibrant colors and crisp detail that captures attention and communicates your message effectively.

Choose from multiple production timelines including same-day rush options to meet any deadline. Whether you need single posters for testing or bulk quantities for major campaigns, our flexible ordering system accommodates projects of any scale.

Three Simple Steps to Custom Poster Success

Upload Print-Ready Files: Select your poster size and specifications, then upload your high-resolution artwork. Our automated system guides you through size selection and material options for optimal results.

Professional Design Service: Let our experienced graphic designers create your custom poster from concept to completion. Provide your images and instructions, and we'll handle the technical details to ensure professional results.

Quick Order Processing: Review your specifications, approve artwork, and track production through delivery. Our streamlined process ensures your custom posters arrive exactly when needed.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Custom Poster Printing

What type of poster paper material do you use?

We use premium poster paper specifically designed for high-resolution digital printing. The paper provides excellent color reproduction, smooth surface texture, and acid-free construction to prevent yellowing and maintain vibrant appearance throughout your display period.

How are your custom posters printed?

Custom posters are printed using advanced digital printing technology that delivers precise color matching and crisp detail reproduction. Our printing process ensures consistent quality across single posters or large quantity orders, with color calibration maintained throughout production.

What are the most common poster sizes?

Popular poster sizes include 11"x17", 18"x24", 24"x36", and 27"x39". We also accommodate custom sizes to fit specific display requirements or unique installation spaces, ensuring your poster fits perfectly in any environment.

Do you offer custom poster sizes, and what size range can I order?

Yes, we provide custom sizing options to meet specific display requirements. Poster sizes can range from small promotional pieces to large-format displays, with exact dimensions tailored to your installation space and visual impact needs.

What are custom posters commonly used for?

Custom posters are ideal for retail promotions, restaurant menus, trade show displays, educational materials, fine art reproductions, and corporate presentations. The versatile format works well for both temporary campaigns and medium-term display applications in indoor environments.

Frequently Asked Questions About Custom Postcards

What size are your custom printed postcards?

Our custom postcards measure 4.00" x 5.625", which is the standard postcard size. This size qualifies for USPS postcard rates, making it cost-effective for direct mail marketing campaigns and personal communications.

What's the difference between matte and gloss postcard finishes?

Gloss finish provides vibrant colors with a shiny, reflective surface that's ideal for photo-heavy designs and marketing materials. Matte finish offers a non-reflective, sophisticated appearance that's easy to write on and reduces glare, making it perfect for text-heavy designs and elegant presentations.

How thick are your custom postcards?

Our postcards are printed on premium 12.4 pt, 120 lb. coverstock paper. This thickness provides a professional feel, durability during mailing, and meets USPS requirements for automated processing while maintaining standard postcard postage rates.

How do I design a custom postcard?

You can upload your own print-ready artwork in .eps, .ai, .pdf, or high-resolution .jpg formats, or utilize our professional design services for $60 per hour. Our designers can create custom layouts from your photos, text, and concepts to produce eye-catching postcards.

What information should I include on a custom postcard?

For business postcards, include your logo, contact information, call-to-action, and key message or offer. For personal postcards, include recipient address space, return address, and your message or announcement. Remember to follow USPS guidelines for address placement and postage area.

What production times are available for custom postcards?

We offer production times from 1 to 5 business days. Options include 1-day priority, 2-day express, 3-day standard (most popular), and 5-day saver. Production begins after artwork approval and payment processing.

Do you offer color matching for brand-specific colors?

Yes, we offer a Color Match Proof System for color-critical projects. This service ensures accurate reproduction of brand-specific colors and is recommended for professional marketing materials where color accuracy is essential.

What file types do you accept for custom postcard printing?

We prefer vector-based files (.eps, .ai) with fonts converted to outlines for best results. We also accept high-resolution .pdf and .jpg files at 300 DPI minimum. All files should be in CMYK color mode with appropriate bleed areas.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------

Custom Photo Tiles with Repositionable Adhesive for Interior Wall Display

Transform your favorite photos into premium custom photo tiles designed for versatile wall display. StikPics photo tiles feature damage-free mounting options that allow you to create stunning wall art without nails, screws, or wall damage. Perfect for renters, homeowners, and interior designers who want flexible photo display solutions.

Each custom photo tile is printed on premium polystyrene foam board with three mounting options: repositionable adhesive for easy repositioning, permanent adhesive for textured surfaces, and traditional picture hangers for existing wall hardware. Create personalized wall galleries, accent walls, or temporary displays with professional-quality photo tiles.

Key Features for Photo Tile Installation

  • Damage-free repositionable adhesive mounting
  • Premium polystyrene foam board construction
  • Scratch, warp, and moisture resistant finish

Premium Polystyrene Material for Photo Tile Durability & Moisture Resistance

StikPics photo tiles are manufactured using premium polystyrene foam board, also known as Gator Board, specifically chosen for interior wall display applications. This professional-grade material provides superior durability and longevity for your custom photo tiles.

Material Construction Benefits

  • Scratch Resistant Surface: Maintains photo quality and appearance over time
  • Warp Resistance: Stays flat against walls without curling or bending
  • Moisture Resistant: Suitable for bathrooms, kitchens, and humid environments
  • Reinforced Core: Melamine and wood fiber veneer provide structural strength
  • Lightweight Design: Easy to handle and mount without heavy-duty hardware

The polystyrene foam board construction ensures your photo tiles maintain their shape and appearance in various indoor environments while providing a stable printing surface for vibrant, long-lasting photo reproduction.

Photo Tile Mounting Options for Wall Installation & Surface Compatibility

Every StikPics photo tile includes three mounting options to ensure compatibility with your specific wall surface and installation preferences. Choose the mounting method that best fits your space and display requirements.

Repositionable Adhesive Mounting

Perfect for smooth, clean surfaces like drywall, painted walls, and glass. This damage-free adhesive allows you to reposition your photo tiles multiple times without leaving residue or damaging wall surfaces. Ideal for renters and temporary displays.

Permanent Adhesive Mounting

Designed for textured surfaces including brick, concrete, wood paneling, and rough-textured walls. Provides a secure, long-lasting hold on challenging surfaces where repositionable adhesive may not adhere properly.

Picture Hanger Mounting

Traditional hanging method that works with existing nails, screws, or picture hanging systems. Perfect for customers who prefer conventional mounting methods or need to match existing gallery wall installations.

Surface Compatibility Guide

  • Smooth Surfaces: Repositionable adhesive recommended
  • Textured Surfaces: Permanent adhesive or picture hanger options
  • Rental Properties: Repositionable adhesive for damage-free removal

Photo Tile Printing FAQ

Can I reposition photo tiles after installation?

Yes, photo tiles with repositionable adhesive can be moved and repositioned multiple times without damaging wall surfaces or leaving residue. This makes them perfect for rental properties and changing design preferences.

What wall surfaces work with photo tile mounting?

Photo tiles adhere to most wall surfaces. Repositionable adhesive works best on smooth surfaces like drywall and painted walls. Permanent adhesive is recommended for textured surfaces like brick, concrete, or wood paneling. Picture hangers work with any surface that supports traditional hanging hardware.

How large can I print my photo tiles?

Custom sizing is available to accommodate various project requirements. Contact customer service for large format printing options and pricing for oversized photo tile installations.

Will photo tiles damage my walls?

Repositionable adhesive mounting is designed to remove cleanly without wall damage or residue. Permanent adhesive creates a stronger bond and may not remove as cleanly. Picture hanger mounting uses existing wall hardware without additional wall contact.

What image resolution do I need for quality printing?

Minimum 800 x 800 pixels for standard sizes, with 300 DPI at final print size recommended for optimal quality. Higher resolution images produce sharper, more detailed results. Our design team can evaluate your images if you're unsure about quality.

How long do photo tiles last?

Premium polystyrene construction with scratch, warp, and moisture resistance ensures long-term durability. High-resolution printing maintains color quality over time when displayed indoors away from direct sunlight.

Can I order photo tiles in different shapes?

Standard rectangular and square formats are available through online ordering. Contact customer service for custom shape options and specialty cutting requirements.

Do you offer bulk pricing for multiple photo tiles?

Quantity discounts are available for large orders. Upload multiple images during checkout or contact customer service for bulk pricing on commercial projects and large installations.

Frequently Asked Questions About Table Tent Printing

What sizes are available for custom table tents?

We offer three standard table tent sizes to fit different table settings and display needs: 4.25" x 6.00" (compact vertical format), 5.00" x 5.00" (square format), and 7.00" x 5.00" (horizontal landscape format). All sizes are printed on 13.4 pt coverstock and include pre-scoring for easy setup.

What's the difference between matte and gloss table tent finishes?

Matte finish provides an elegant, non-reflective surface that reduces glare under restaurant lighting and offers easy readability from multiple angles. Gloss finish delivers vibrant color reproduction with enhanced image sharpness and an eye-catching reflective surface that's easy to clean. Choose based on your lighting environment and brand aesthetic preferences.

How thick are your table tent cards?

Our table tent cards are printed on premium 13.4 pt coverstock paper, providing excellent stability and durability for restaurant and business environments. This weight ensures your table tents maintain their shape and professional appearance even with frequent customer interaction and table service activities.

How do I design professional table tent cards?

For best results, provide vector-based files (.eps or .ai) with fonts converted to outlines, or high-resolution .pdf/.jpg files at 300 DPI. Include 0.125" bleed on all sides and keep important text 0.25" from fold lines. Our professional graphic design team is available to help optimize your artwork or create designs from scratch.

How are table tents typically used in restaurants and businesses?

Table tents serve as powerful point-of-service marketing tools for promoting daily specials, drink promotions, dessert menus, and catering services in restaurants. Businesses use them for service promotions, product information, event announcements, and contact details. They're also effective for trade show displays and special event marketing.

Ready to illuminate your brand with professional translucent materials? Our premium adhesive-backed vinyl and non-adhesive backlit film options provide the perfect solution for any backlit display installation.

Why Choose Our Translucent Materials

  • Superior Color Reproduction: CMYK digital printing delivers vibrant, consistent colors optimized for backlit applications
  • Professional Durability: Choose from 3 mil adhesive vinyl or 5.5 mil backlit film, both designed for commercial use
  • Flexible Installation: Adhesive or non-adhesive options accommodate any mounting system
  • Custom Sizing: Print up to 144" × 58" for large format installations
  • Fast Production: 1-5 day production options with live order tracking

Complete Installation Support

Our materials work perfectly with existing light box systems or new backlit display installations. Choose square cutting for standard applications, or add custom die cutting for unique shapes and designs.

Optional lamination protection extends material life and enhances durability for high-traffic outdoor installations. Bulk quantity pricing automatically applies for large projects and multiple-piece orders.

Start Your Backlit Display Project

Upload your artwork and select your material options using our online configurator. Our graphic design team will review your files and provide a digital proof within hours. With secure payment processing and nationwide shipping, your custom translucent materials will arrive ready for professional installation.

Frequently Asked Questions

What material choices are available for translucent (backlit) prints?

We offer two translucent materials: Translucent Non-Adhesive Backlit Film and Adhesive-Backed Translucent Vinyl. The non-adhesive film is 5.5 mil and scratch and water-resistant, and the adhesive-backed vinyl is 3 mil with a semi-gloss finish and up to 7-year durability with the long-term lamination option.

What are the size limits for translucent backlit film and translucent vinyl?

Both material options can be printed up to 144" × 58".

What colors/ink system do you use to print translucent materials?

We digitally print using CMYK (cyan, magenta, yellow, and black).

Do you offer bulk pricing for translucent material products?

Yes—bulk discounts are available, and pricing decreases as quantity increases.

Can translucent materials be used outdoors?

Yes, both our adhesive vinyl and backlit film are designed for outdoor use. The adhesive vinyl offers up to 7 years of outdoor durability when laminated, while the backlit film features scratch and water-resistant properties for long-term outdoor installations.

What's the difference between adhesive and non-adhesive translucent materials?

Adhesive-backed vinyl applies directly to smooth surfaces like light box faces, while non-adhesive backlit film is designed for mounting systems, tensioning frames, or mechanical fastening methods. Choose based on your specific installation requirements.

Custom T-Shirt Frequently Asked Questions

What is the minimum order quantity for custom t-shirts?

Minimum order quantities vary by printing method. Direct-to-garment printing has no minimum, while screen printing typically requires 12 pieces per design/color combination.

How long do custom t-shirts take to produce?

Production times range from 2-14 business days depending on printing method and quantity. Rush production is available for most orders.

What file formats do you accept for custom t-shirt artwork?

We accept vector files (AI, EPS, PDF) and high-resolution raster files (PNG, JPG) at 300 DPI minimum. Free artwork consultation is available.

Do custom t-shirts shrink after washing?

All t-shirt materials are pre-shrunk to minimize shrinkage. We recommend washing in cold water and air drying for best results.

Can I get a sample before placing a large custom t-shirt order?

Yes, sample t-shirts are available for most materials and printing methods. Contact customer service for sample pricing and availability.

What printing method works best for detailed custom t-shirt designs?

Direct-to-garment printing provides the best results for detailed artwork, photographs, and designs with multiple colors or gradients.

Custom Wallpaper Design & Installation Solutions for Interior Walls

Transform your interior spaces with professional-grade self-adhesive wallpaper that eliminates the mess of traditional wallpaper paste. Our custom printed wallpaper features durable vinyl construction with removable adhesive backing, making it perfect for homes, offices, retail spaces, and commercial interior applications.

Each wallpaper is printed in full color using high-resolution digital printing technology, ensuring vibrant colors and sharp detail reproduction for your custom artwork or photography. The self-adhesive backing bonds securely to smooth wall surfaces while remaining removable for future updates or repositioning.

Our vinyl wallpaper material resists fading, moisture, and everyday wear, making it suitable for high-traffic interior areas. The smooth surface finish accepts cleaning with standard household cleaners, maintaining its appearance over time in residential and commercial installations.

Custom sizing options accommodate everything from accent walls to full room coverage, with seamless panel matching available for large wall installations. Professional installation guidelines are provided with each order to ensure proper application and long-lasting adhesion.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Self-Adhesive Vinyl Material for Interior Wall Applications

Our custom wallpaper is constructed from premium vinyl material specifically engineered for interior wall applications. The durable vinyl substrate provides excellent print quality while maintaining flexibility for application around corners and architectural details.

The self-adhesive backing uses a repositionable adhesive system that bonds firmly to painted drywall, smooth plaster, and other prepared wall surfaces. This adhesive remains removable, allowing for repositioning during installation and complete removal when updates are needed.

The vinyl surface features a smooth matte finish that reduces glare while providing excellent color saturation for photographic and graphic designs. This material resists common household stains and accepts gentle cleaning with damp cloths and mild detergents.

Thickness specifications ensure the wallpaper lies flat against wall surfaces without bubbling or lifting, while maintaining enough body to hide minor wall imperfections. The material remains dimensionally stable in typical interior temperature and humidity conditions.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Wallpaper Finishing & Installation Options

Standard finishing includes precision cutting to your specified dimensions with clean, straight edges ready for installation. Multiple panels for large wall coverage are manufactured with alignment marks to ensure proper registration during installation.

Installation backing includes a protective release liner that prevents adhesive contamination during storage and shipping. The liner features easy-peel properties that allow for smooth removal during application without adhesive residue.

Panel matching services are available for designs that span multiple sections, ensuring seamless pattern continuation across wall surfaces. Our production team can adjust artwork positioning to minimize visible seams in the final installation.

Custom cutting options include trimming around outlets, switches, and architectural features when detailed measurements are provided. Installation guidelines and application tools recommendations are included with each order to support successful installation.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Wallpaper Production & Turnaround Times

We offer flexible production schedules to accommodate your project timeline, with options ranging from one to five business days. Production time begins once artwork approval is complete and file upload is finalized.

1 Business Day Priority

Express production for urgent interior projects. Orders received after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day. Emergency same-day production may be available through customer service coordination.

2 Business Days Express

Accelerated production timeline for commercial installations and quick residential updates. Ideal for projects with moderate time constraints requiring quality assurance review.

3 Business Days Standard

Our most popular production option, providing excellent turnaround for most custom wallpaper projects. This timeline allows for thorough quality control while maintaining fast delivery for interior installations.

5 Business Days Saver

Cost-effective production timeline for non-urgent projects. This option provides maximum value while ensuring the same quality standards for your custom wallpaper installation.

Note: Total delivery time includes both production and shipping duration. Orders requiring proofs or artwork modifications begin production timing after final approval is received.

Wallpaper Payment & Ordering Options

All custom wallpaper orders require payment confirmation before production begins, ensuring your project moves through our production queue without delay. We accept all major credit cards including Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover.

Check payments are accepted for larger commercial orders and must be received and cleared before production scheduling. Corporate accounts with established credit terms should contact customer service for specialized payment arrangements.

Credit card charges are processed only after final artwork approval and order confirmation, providing you with complete control over your custom wallpaper specifications before payment authorization.

For detailed payment terms, bulk order pricing, or corporate account setup, our customer service team can provide specialized assistance for commercial interior projects and high-volume wallpaper installations.

Shipping Options for Custom Wallpaper Delivery

Standard shipping utilizes UPS Ground service, providing 1-3 day delivery to 90% of the United States. Custom wallpaper ships in protective tubes or flat packaging depending on size specifications, ensuring your material arrives in perfect condition for installation.

Expedited shipping options include Three Day, Two Day, and Overnight delivery for urgent interior projects. Shipping costs are calculated based on package dimensions, weight, and destination, with tracking information provided once shipment is processed.

Large format wallpaper installations may require freight shipping for oversized panels. Additional shipping charges apply to orders exceeding standard dimensional limits, with specific rates provided during the ordering process.

International shipping is available with customer-provided shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently accepting USPS and UPS international labels for wallpaper delivery outside the United States.

Damaged goods must be returned for replacement processing, while lost packages are replaced after carrier confirmation, typically within 7-10 business days of scheduled delivery. Weather delays and carrier-related issues do not qualify for shipping cost refunds.

Interior Wall Applications for Custom Self-Adhesive Wallpaper

Residential interior applications include accent walls, bedroom feature walls, living room focal points, and home office design elements. The removable adhesive makes it ideal for rental properties and temporary interior updates without permanent wall modification.

Commercial interior installations serve retail environments, restaurant dining areas, office reception spaces, and hospitality settings. The durable vinyl construction withstands high-traffic areas while maintaining professional appearance standards.

Specialty applications include trade show booth backdrops, temporary event installations, and seasonal interior displays. The repositionable adhesive allows for multiple uses across different interior locations and design changes.

Healthcare and educational facilities utilize custom wallpaper for wayfinding graphics, branded interior elements, and decorative wall treatments that require easy maintenance and occasional updates without wall damage.

Creative applications include photography studios, art installations, theatrical set design, and temporary gallery displays where custom imagery and easy removal capabilities are essential project requirements.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Wallpaper Artwork Requirements & File Specifications

Vector-based artwork files produce the highest print quality for custom wallpaper applications. Adobe Illustrator (.ai) and Encapsulated PostScript (.eps) files with fonts converted to outlines ensure crisp text and graphic elements at any size.

High-resolution raster files including PDF and JPEG formats are acceptable when created at 150-300 DPI at final print dimensions. Photography and detailed imagery should be provided at maximum available resolution for optimal wallpaper print quality.

Artwork Guidelines

Design files should include appropriate bleed areas for edge trimming, typically 0.125 inches beyond final wallpaper dimensions. Color mode should be set to CMYK for accurate color reproduction in the digital printing process.

Professional Design Services

Our graphic design team can create custom wallpaper artwork from your concepts, photographs, or existing brand elements. Design services include color matching, layout optimization, and file preparation for interior wall applications.

Proofing System

Order proofs provide low-resolution previews of your wallpaper design along with complete order specifications for approval before production. Color-critical projects can utilize our Color Match Proof System for precise color verification.

File upload completion triggers production timeline calculations. Orders requiring artwork modifications or proof approvals begin production timing after final design approval is received.

Transform your interior spaces with professional-quality custom wallpaper that installs easily without messy paste or complicated preparation. Our self-adhesive vinyl wallpaper delivers exceptional print quality for your artwork while providing removable convenience for future updates.

Start your custom wallpaper project by selecting your dimensions and uploading your design artwork. Our online system guides you through size options, production timelines, and finishing specifications to create the perfect interior wall solution.

Professional design assistance is available if you need help optimizing your artwork for wallpaper printing or creating new designs from scratch. Our graphic design team specializes in interior wall applications and can ensure your custom wallpaper exceeds expectations.

Ready to create stunning interior walls with custom wallpaper? Configure your specifications, upload your artwork, and place your order today. Experience the difference that professional-grade materials and expert craftsmanship make in your interior design projects.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions

What surfaces can custom wallpaper be applied to?

Our self-adhesive wallpaper works best on smooth, clean painted walls, including latex and acrylic paint finishes. It also adheres well to smooth plaster, primed drywall, and other non-textured interior wall surfaces. The surface should be clean, dry, and free from dust or grease for optimal adhesion.

Will custom wallpaper stick to all painted walls?

The wallpaper adheres best to walls painted with quality latex or acrylic paints that have fully cured. Freshly painted walls should cure for at least 30 days before wallpaper application. Flat or matte paint finishes may not provide optimal adhesion compared to satin or semi-gloss finishes.

What material is custom wallpaper made from?

Our custom wallpaper is constructed from durable vinyl material with a self-adhesive backing. The vinyl provides excellent print quality, moisture resistance, and durability for interior applications. The adhesive is designed to be removable without damaging properly painted wall surfaces.

Do I need wallpaper paste for custom wallpaper installation?

No wallpaper paste is required. Our custom wallpaper features a self-adhesive backing with a protective release liner. Simply peel away the liner and apply the wallpaper directly to your prepared wall surface. This eliminates the mess and complexity of traditional wallpaper paste application.

Is custom self-adhesive wallpaper removable?

Yes, our wallpaper is designed to be removable from most properly painted wall surfaces. The adhesive bonds securely during use but can be peeled away when removal is desired. Some adhesive residue may remain on certain paint types and can typically be cleaned with mild adhesive remover.

What are the printing size limits for custom wallpaper?

Custom wallpaper can be produced in widths up to 54 inches and virtually unlimited length for large wall coverage. Multiple panels can be manufactured for wider installations with pattern matching available to ensure seamless appearance across panel joints.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
